creator: grahamperrin@freebsd.org
text:
Bug 163522 related to creation of the list, and <https://lists.freebsd.org/mailman/listinfo> refers to: 

<https://lists.freebsd.org/mailman/listinfo/freebsd-ports-announce>

There's redirection to <https://lists.freebsd.org/subscription/freebsd-ports>, is this intended? 

This month's <https://lists.freebsd.org/archives/freebsd-ports/2021-July/000295.html> was copied to freebsd-ports-announce
